de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBlockContract, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionNodeReader

    public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract
extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionBlockContract
    An implementation of IExecutionBlockContract which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

                                        boolean preconditionComplied)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
        name - The name of this node.
        pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
        formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
        preconditionComplied - Precondition complied?
